project.name: Bump
project.summary: Bump is a production release-automation tool that creates release PRs, changelogs, semantic versions, GitHub releases, and npm publishes.
goals: Own the @sylphx/bump CLI, GitHub Action, release PR logic, monorepo package detection, changelog generation, and npm publishing workflow.
Keep package release semantics explicit, testable, and compatible with Bun, npm, yarn, pnpm, and workspace protocols.
Dogfood the local action through the repo release workflow before publishing.
nonGoals: Own downstream repositories' product release policy, branch protection, npm credentials, or publishing approval.
Silently redefine Changesets, npm, GitHub Actions, or enterprise doctrine behavior outside Bump's documented public contract.
Treat source revert as complete recovery after a package version has been published.

owns.name: release-automation
owns.description: Release intent parsing, package graph detection, semantic version planning, changelog generation, and release PR creation.

owns.name: package-publishing-action
owns.description: The @sylphx/bump CLI and GitHub Action entrypoints used by repositories to publish npm packages.

doesNotOwn: Downstream repositories' product release policy, branch protection, npm credentials, or publishing approval.
The npm registry, GitHub Actions platform, or enterprise doctrine policy.
Package-specific release decisions for sibling repositories unless they are expressed through Bump's public action inputs.
forbiddenCouplings: Do not add downstream-repo special cases to release planning without a documented action input or public contract.
Do not publish package versions without explicit release intent and npm publish proof.
Do not rely on source revert for already-published npm versions.

delivery.deployPath: Release workflow builds the package and dogfoods the local action to create release PRs or publish to npm with NPM_TOKEN.
delivery.productionProof: Required CI context, build output, generated release PR or publish run, npm package readback, and GitHub release/changelog evidence.

packageRelease.releaseIntent: Conventional commits and optional bump files determine release intent; release workflow dogfoods the local Bump action.
packageRelease.versionPr: Bump creates or updates release PRs before publishing unless explicitly configured for direct release mode.
packageRelease.publisher: GitHub Actions release workflow using GITHUB_TOKEN and NPM_TOKEN.
packageRelease.publishProof: npm package readback for @sylphx/bump plus release PR/GitHub release/changelog evidence.

gaps.description: CI is repo-local legacy GitHub Actions; migrate to central admission or stable status fan-in when the fleet workflow is ready.
Clarify whether Bump should publish with a dedicated release bot identity rather than the default GitHub token actor.
gaps.target: before standardizing package publish identity across the fleet
